text: docs/sections/ directory is unjustified complexity for single-maintainer repo
{{PLACEHOLDER}} substitution is home-grown templating after rejecting templating
Full CLAUDE.md inlining is bloat — operational instructions, not architecture
Concrete drift already exists between script and architecture.md (noxctl naming, ownership, MacBook node)
Component deep dives are mostly repo inventory dump, not architecture
Use existing architecture.md as curated source instead of inventing new section files
Slim component table with role/port is still mixing stable facts with snapshot — role and port belong in curated doc
Dependency appendix status unresolved (optional vs included)
Assembled doc mixes curated future-state and generated roadmap — different truth types with different update rhythms
Must define authority boundary (which facts belong to architecture.md vs snapshot.md) BEFORE touching the generator
